pi_items.source: task.json description field line 5 states: 'The location should be set to "Saint-Porchaire" (or the default farm location)'. Web search confirms Saint-Porchaire is a real commune in Charente-Maritime, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. However, task description indicates it is optional ('or the default farm location').

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic benchmark task for creating a storage location in Ekylibre farm management software. The task requires creating a storage location named 'Silo Bio 01' with code 'SILO-BIO-01' at location 'Saint-Porchaire' (or the default farm location). All metadata values are defined in the task description and consistently referenced across setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py scripts. Saint-Porchaire is a verified real location in France (Charente-Maritime). The task uses a demo Ekylibre instance and operates on synthetic data created during task execution.
